mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.project_name, t0.project_id, t0.compensation_amount, t0.compensation_date, t0.write_dff_amount, t0.write_off_date, t0.write_off_classification, t0.total_collection_amount, t0.remarks, t0.is_deleted, t0.write_off_status
